SEARCH
Package net.boricj.bft.coff

Class CoffFile.Builder

java.lang.Object
net.boricj.bft.coff.CoffFile.Builder
Enclosing class:
CoffFile
public static class CoffFile.Builder extends Object
Builder for constructing COFF files programmatically.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    Builder(CoffMachine machine)
    Creates a new COFF file builder for the specified machine architecture.

    Method
    Description
    CoffFile
    build()
    Builds a COFF file from this builder configuration.
    short
    getCharacteristics()
    Returns the COFF header characteristics flags.
    Charset
    getCharset()
    Returns the charset used by the COFF string table.
    CoffMachine
    getMachine()
    Returns the COFF machine target used when building the file.

    Returns the COFF timestamp value stored in the header.

    Sets COFF header characteristics flags.

    Sets the charset used by the COFF string table.

    Sets the COFF timestamp value stored in the header.

  • Constructor Details

    • Builder

      public Builder(CoffMachine machine)
      Creates a new COFF file builder for the specified machine architecture.
      Parameters:
      machine - the target machine architecture

  • Method Details

    • getMachine

      public CoffMachine getMachine()
      Returns the COFF machine target used when building the file.
      Returns:
      machine target

    • getTimeDateStamp

      public int getTimeDateStamp()
      Returns the COFF timestamp value stored in the header.
      Returns:
      timestamp value

    • setTimeDateStamp

      public CoffFile.Builder setTimeDateStamp(int timeDateStamp)
      Sets the COFF timestamp value stored in the header.
      Parameters:
      timeDateStamp - timestamp value to write in the header
      Returns:
      this builder

    • getCharacteristics

      public short getCharacteristics()
      Returns the COFF header characteristics flags.
      Returns:
      characteristics flags

    • setCharacteristics

      public CoffFile.Builder setCharacteristics(short characteristics)
      Sets COFF header characteristics flags.
      Parameters:
      characteristics - flags value
      Returns:
      this builder

    • getCharset

      public Charset getCharset()
      Returns the charset used by the COFF string table.
      Returns:
      charset used by the string table

    • setCharset

      public CoffFile.Builder setCharset(Charset charset)
      Sets the charset used by the COFF string table.
      Parameters:
      charset - charset used for encoding and decoding strings
      Returns:
      this builder

    • build

      public CoffFile build()
      Builds a COFF file from this builder configuration.
      Returns:
      new COFF file
